raw.message:
🇪🇸 R. MADRID vs MUNICH 🇩🇪
Parie sur le meilleur du foot européen avec Betclic ! 🏆

hook.summary: A high-energy sports betting promotion featuring a match between Madrid and Munich with a 100€ bonus offer.
hook.visual_action: Two football jerseys are displayed in a stadium setting with betting odds and a large promotional banner appearing.
hook.voiceover_transcript: We're about to change the game, we're on your team today

scene_flow: Introduction of the Madrid vs Munich football matchup.
Display of the 100€ freebet promotional offer.
Presentation of specific betting odds for win, draw, and loss outcomes.
Static display of the full offer with mandatory gambling health warnings.
on_screen_text: *MONTANT DE TON 1ER PARI REVERSÉ EN CRÉDITS DE JEU NON RETIRABLES S'IL EST PERDANT
LES JEUX D'ARGENT ET DE HASARD PEUVENT ÊTRE DANGEREUX : PERTES D'ARGENT, CONFLITS FAMILIAUX, ADDICTION... RETROUVEZ NOS CONSEILS SUR JOUEURS-INFO-SERVICE.FR (09 74 75 13 13, APPEL NON SURTAXÉ)
audience_proxy: French-speaking male football fans aged 18-35 interested in sports betting and promotional offers.
